summary: Comprehensive testing of MediConnect medical records application completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with one critical UI interaction issue preventing doctor registration.

ui_bugs.issue: Doctor role selection dropdown not working properly - cannot select 'Médico' option
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents doctor registration via UI, blocking doctor workflow testing

integration_issues.issue: Session management issue when accessing /chat-ai directly via URL
integration_issues.impact: Redirects to login instead of maintaining session

passed_tests: Backend AI chat integration with OpenAI GPT-5.2
Frontend profile management (blood type, allergies, conditions, medications)
Frontend AI chat functionality (when properly authenticated)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix doctor role selection dropdown in registration form - the 'Médico' option cannot be selected properly, preventing doctor registration via UI. This blocks complete testing of doctor workflow. Also improve session management for direct URL access to protected pages.
